description_long: This is a plush rabbit doll with a worn, vintage appearance, featuring a brown fabric body and exaggeratedly large, floppy ears—one of which is bent. The face is adorned with mismatched button eyes and a stitched mouth, giving it a slightly eerie, handmade look. A purple bow with a yellow button at the center is tied around its neck, and a white skeleton pattern is printed on its torso, adding a unique, slightly macabre touch. The limbs are stubby and rounded, with visible seam lines, and the doll's surface appears textured and slightly rough, suggesting a well-loved, aged toy. There is a small metallic chain attached to one arm, possibly for hanging or carrying. The back of the doll is plain, with no additional markings or features.
description: A vintage-style brown plush rabbit doll with floppy ears, button eyes, a purple bow, and a printed skeleton design on its torso.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face with button eyes, stitched mouth, purple bow, yellow button, and skeleton print on the torso.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bent ear, the profile of the face, and the protruding limbs, with the bow and skeleton print partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain brown back of the head and body, both ears visible, and the small chain accessory on the left arm.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other profile, the chain accessory, and the side of the bow and skeleton print.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll wears a purple bow with a yellow button at the neck, and its torso features a printed white skeleton motif. No other garments are present, and the style is reminiscent of handmade or vintage plush toys with a slightly gothic or Halloween-inspired theme.
attribute_pose: The doll is depicted in a seated position with both legs splayed outward, arms angled downward and slightly forward, head upright with one ear bent and the other standing tall. The torso is upright and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with button eyes of different colors and a stitched, straight mouth, giving a slightly somber or expressionless appearance.
attribute_hair_style: No hair is present; the head is covered in the same brown fabric as the body.
